title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Anthropic's GTM team built CLAFTS, an AI email assistant powered by the Claude API and Claude Code that automatically drafts customer replies in the user's voice. The tool helps sales reps reduce administrative overhead by automating email composition while maintaining personalized communication.
